stations.cue: settle in — breathe with the tunnel
stations.guide: sit tall, feet on the floor — just breathe

stations.cue: slowly turn your head to the left … then to the right
stations.guide: turn your head fully left, pause — then fully right

stations.cue: let one ear sink toward its shoulder … then the other
stations.guide: ear toward shoulder, hold — then the other side

stations.cue: look slowly up into the light … then tuck your chin
stations.guide: chin up toward the ceiling, hold — then chin to chest

stations.cue: draw your shoulders up to your ears … and let them fall
stations.guide: shoulders up to your ears, hold — then drop them

stations.cue: reach your left hand up into the ring
stations.guide: raise your left arm high until the ring fills

stations.cue: now the right hand — reach for the light
stations.guide: raise your right arm high

stations.cue: reach across your body into the ring
stations.guide: reach one hand across to the far side

stations.cue: turn as far as feels kind — first left, then right
stations.guide: turn as far as you comfortably can, each way

stations.cue: settle in — breathe with the tunnel
stations.guide: sit tall, feet on the floor — just breathe

stations.cue: slowly turn your head to the left … then to the right
stations.guide: turn your head fully left, pause — then fully right

stations.cue: let one ear sink toward its shoulder … then the other
stations.guide: ear toward shoulder, hold — then the other side

stations.cue: draw your shoulders up to your ears … and let them fall
stations.guide: shoulders up to your ears, hold — then drop them

stations.cue: now rise — the path widens when you stand
stations.guide: stand up and step back until your hips are in view

stations.cue: reach both arms into the light above you
stations.guide: both arms overhead, stretch tall — then let them fall

stations.cue: let the current bend you — one side, then the other
stations.guide: lean your whole torso left, hold — then right

stations.cue: turn with the tunnel — slowly, all the way around
stations.guide: twist your shoulders left, then right, slowly

stations.cue: rise onto your toes … and settle back down
stations.guide: rise onto your toes, lower — six times

stations.cue: let everything go loose — shake the water off
stations.guide: shake out your arms and shoulders, loose and easy

stations.cue: one last look — as far as feels kind, each way
stations.guide: turn as far as you comfortably can, each way
